In vitro cellular uptake

onto the cell surface especially along the pseudopodia
(Figure  3,  left),  with  no  significant  uptake  of  AsODN-
loaded nanoparticles into the cells. However, nanopar-
ticles  with  cells  incubated  at  34  °C  were  internalized
